name: Artichoke Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Bend back the outer petals (skeleton) of the artichokes until they snap off easily near the base. The edible portion of the petals should remain on the artichoke hearts.
2. Continue to snap off and discard the petals until the central core of pale green petals is reached.
3. Cut off the stems and top 2 inches of the artichokes; discard.
4. Trim the outer dark green layer from the artichoke bottoms.
5. Cut each artichoke in half lengthwise.
6. Remove the center petal and fuzzy centers from each half.
7. Cut each half into fourths lengthwise.
8. Dip or rub all surfaces with lemon juice.
9. Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
10. Stir in the prepared artichokes, sugar, and tarragon.
11. Add wine and water; cook until the artichokes are tender.
12. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
13. Stir in mushrooms and cook until the mushrooms are tender.
14. Stir in tomato and cook until the tomato is thoroughly heated.
